body.text: Top of mind: New ATF Director Robert Cekada signs 34 rule changes moments after bipartisan Senate confirmation

Cekada confirmed Tuesday Apr 29 (every Republican plus seven Democrats) and immediately signed a 34-item ATF package: 7 final rules + 27 proposed. Acting AG Blanche framed the package as 'repealing rules that went beyond what the law allows.' Federal Register publication of individual rule text is the active watch — content opportunity once specific rules drop.
